ogTitle: Ferny Creek vs Fiery Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ferny Creek and Fiery Flat.
heading: Ferny Creek vs Fiery Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ferny Creek, Victoria and Fiery Flat, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ferny Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Fiery Flat (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ferny Creek or Fiery Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ferny Creek has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Fiery Flat scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ferny Creek scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Fiery Flat scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ferny Creek or Fiery Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ferny Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
